notes: v366 — NEW: a one-tap 🧮 fix fees button, and 💾 Backup now saves BOTH accounts together. If your Fees Paid looks way too high — for example after a portfolio got imported into the wrong account — open 💼 Portfolio, pick the account, and tap '🧮 fix fees' (next to ➕ add cash). It resets Fees Paid to what your actual trades add up to and returns the over-charged money to your cash. Nothing else in that account is touched. '💾 Backup account to file' now saves BOTH your 👤 My Trading and 🤖 Auto-pilot accounts in one file, and restoring puts each back in its own slot — so a normal portfolio can never land in the 🤖 auto account by accident again. Also: ↩ Undo now finds the trade even if its recorded sell-date shifted since you closed it. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to load v366.
